overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-style video game showing the player character swimming through a flooded industrial canal at dusk. The environment features towering industrial buildings with bright neon billboards, metal walkways overhead, and transitions between open water and covered underpasses.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded industrial canal between commercial buildings

agents.ego_description: swimming forward through the open canal toward the industrial buildings and yellow crane structure in the distance

entered.detail: large cylindrical industrial structure with multiple neon billboards and advertisements
tall yellow construction crane visible against the pink dusk sky
metal bridge structure spanning across the canal connecting buildings
calm water surface reflecting the pink sky and neon lights
concrete edge along the water with metal support beams
illuminated advertising signs on the industrial building facade

segments.scene_description: The player swims through an open industrial canal at dusk, flanked by a massive red industrial building covered in neon billboards on the left and concrete embankments on the right. The pink sky reflects off the calm water as a yellow crane structure looms in the distance.

events.description: enters dark covered underpass beneath the industrial building, losing sky visibility

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through the narrow waterway under the building structure

entered.detail: low concrete ceiling of the covered walkway creating an enclosed tunnel effect
large industrial orange pipes running along the right wall
scattered litter and debris accumulated along the concrete embankment

segments.scene_description: The player moves into a dark, enclosed underpass beneath the industrial building. The space is narrow with a low concrete ceiling, orange industrial pipes lining the right wall, and trash scattered along the embankment. The water becomes dark and murky in the absence of natural light.

scene_state.functional_zone: open industrial canal with neon-lit buildings

events.description: exits the covered underpass back into the open canal with visible sky and neon lighting
game notification 'ARRIVED' appears briefly in the lower left corner
camera turns to view the red industrial building from a new angle while continuing to move

agents.ego_description: swimming back through the open canal, turning to observe the industrial buildings and neon reflections on the water

entered.detail: re-emerging view of the cylindrical industrial building with illuminated signage
yellow crane visible again against the darkening sky
colorful reflections of neon lights dancing on the water surface

segments.scene_description: The player exits the dark underpass back into the open canal, where the pink dusk sky and neon lights become visible again. A game notification briefly appears indicating arrival at the destination. The player continues swimming, turning to view the industrial architecture and colorful light reflections on the water from different angles.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective swimming through a flooded industrial canal that transitions from an open neon-lit expanse into a dark underpass before returning to the dusk light. It begins in open water flanked by a massive red building covered in neon billboards, with the pink sky reflecting off the surface toward a distant yellow crane. As the camera moves forward, the scene shifts abruptly into a narrow, enclosed underpass where the natural light vanishes, replaced by murky water and orange industrial pipes lining a low concrete ceiling. The camera then emerges from the darkness back into the open canal, where the vibrant pink sky and colorful neon reflections reappear. Finally, the view turns to survey the surrounding industrial architecture from different angles as a destination notification appears on the screen.
